            if (currentVal > modMap.get(mod)) {
                modMap.set(mod, currentVal);
            }
        } else {
            modMap.set(mod, currentVal);
        }
    }
    
    const totalSum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    return totalSum - dp;
}
